description_long: This is a tall, rectangular control cabinet with a predominantly black exterior and metallic trim, featuring a front panel with multiple circular dials, switches, and a display section. The upper section has a red and white label area, while the middle section contains four large, round dials and several smaller control buttons. Below the dials, there is a horizontal display or indicator panel with a series of lights or readouts, and a row of buttons or switches beneath it. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain and unadorned, with a smooth, metallic finish. The overall design suggests it is used for monitoring or controlling electrical or mechanical systems in an urban infrastructure setting.
description: A tall, black control cabinet with front-facing dials, switches, and indicator panels, accented by metallic trim and a red label area. The sides and back are plain and metallic.
description_view_0: Front view showing all interactive elements: dials, switches, indicator panel, and label area.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain and featureless with a smooth metallic surface.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely plain and black with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, plain and metallic.
